Event: Magic Training - Phoenix
Event Date: 22/05/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AX33
Phoenix Trainer Axe

When attacking, has a [42%-45%] chance of dealing [155%-170%] splash damage.
Once in a while, the attacks of this unit and all allied units start ignoring 65% armor for 4 sec. For 4 sec., all enemy units in a large radius around them will also be receiving physical damage equal to 15% of the axe wielder's maximum health.
The axe's wielder restores health equal to 75% of the damage dealt.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event date: 22/05/2026

Sage bot code: AX33

First trigger: 5 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
